title: koenigia delicatula subsp. relicta
intro: Koenigia delicatula subsp. relicta, also known as Tibetan bramble or Chinese bramble, is a plant species endemic to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Koenigia delicatula subsp. relicta include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol and blood pressure. In herbal preparations, it is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
